description: Three-layer rule set registry. Each certificate type resolves to an ordered composition of layers (core + route + commodity), plus an optional tenant practice layer. The engine reads this file at request time to compose a system prompt and library set for an incoming certificate. To add a new certificate type: create a types/<code>.md file under the relevant commodity folder and register it here.

headerKeywords: Dairy products intended for human consumption
detection.notes: Human-consumption template. Footer carries 8468EHC prefix with language code.

headerKeywords: Milk, milk-based products and milk-derived products not for human consumption
detection.notes: Non-human-consumption template. Footer carries only language code (en/fr/da/nl etc.) without EHC prefix. Detection relies on header text and I.28 Category 3 labelling.

headerKeywords: meat products not required to undergo
detection.notes: Human-consumption template. Footer carries 8384EHC prefix with language code.
Non-human-consumption template (ABP petfood). Footer may follow same minimalist pattern as 8322 — TBC against real 8324 certificate. Detection relies on header and I.25 Petfood box.
Human-consumption template. Footer carries 8350EHC prefix with language code.
Human-consumption template. Footer carries 8436EHC prefix with language code.

headerKeywords: Egg products intended for human consumption
detection.notes: Human-consumption template. Footer carries 8471EHC prefix with language code.
